enabled.description: Enable or disable the Amazon Polly speech provider.

voice.description: Default Polly voice ID (e.g. Joanna, Matthew, Ruth, Stephen).

region.description: AWS region for the Polly service (e.g. us-east-1).

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.help: Enable or disable Amazon Polly TTS.

voice.label: Voice
voice.help: Polly voice ID. Use generative voices (Ruth, Stephen) for best quality. See: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/polly/latest/dg/voicelist.html

engine.label: Engine
engine.help: Generative engine produces the most natural speech. Neural is faster. Standard is cheapest.

region.label: AWS Region
region.help: Region for Polly API calls. Choose the region closest to your deployment.

languageCode.label: Language Code
languageCode.help: BCP-47 language code. Required for bilingual voices.

sampleRate.label: Sample Rate
sampleRate.help: Audio sample rate in Hz. Default: 24000 for generative/neural, 22050 for standard.
